South Indian Classic

Puliyogare

Tangy tamarind rice tempered with mustard, curry leaves, red chillies and roasted peanuts — a beloved South Indian temple-style speciality.

❤️ Our Promise

Why Choose Subbu's Kitchen?

🌿

100% Pure Vegetarian

Not a single non-veg item ever enters our kitchen. Completely safe for Jain and Sattvic diets on request.

🌅

Cooked Fresh Every Day

We cook in small batches every morning. No reheating, no day-old food. What you get is what was made today.

🚫

Zero Preservatives

No artificial colours, no preservatives, no MSG. Just real spices, fresh vegetables, and home-style cooking.

👨‍🍳

Real Home Cook, Real Hygiene

One passionate home cook who takes pride in every dish — prepared in a spotlessly clean kitchen.

🛵

Multiple Delivery Options

Order via Ownly by Rapido (best prices!), Zomato or Swiggy — right to your door in RR Nagar.

🎁

Free Sweet on 2+ Meals

Order 2 or more Normal Meals or Subbu's Meals and we'll include a homemade sweet — on the house!
